name: chrY_AZF_palindromes_P1_P8
description: Y-chromosome male-specific region (MSY) ampliconic palindromes P1-P8 in Yq11.2 (AZFb/AZFc region). Eight massive palindromic repeats (50 kb to ~1.45 Mb arms) with arm-to-arm identity of 99.94-99.997% mediate NAHR causing recurrent AZF microdeletions (azoospermia/oligozoospermia). Among the most highly identical SDs in the genome.

architecture.internal_structure: Eight palindromes P1-P8 with arm lengths from 9 to 1450 kb; arm-to-arm identity 99.94-99.997% (Skaletsky 2003); contain testis-expressed gene families RBMY, DAZ, BPY2, PRY, CDY, TSPY; P5/proximal-P1 NAHR drives AZFb deletions, b1/b3 and b2/b4 drive AZFc.
